final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring a character inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 赵灵儿 IP aesthetic.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation, Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout (3 rows × 3 columns, 9 panels total), each panel framed as a character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman (flowing light-colored hair, delicate ancient-fantasy features), each panel a distinct expression + action + outfit combination:
  Top-left: winking / adjusting glasses / green sweater
  Top-center: smirking / lowering dark sunglasses / red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking / finger on chin / yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile / arms resting on edge / black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling / thumbs up / orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral / drinking boba tea / blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy / waving / purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed / arms crossed / pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly / poking cheeks / teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel backdrop is a torn white paper hole revealing the character bust
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, lively and expressive atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied palette across panels — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D render surface treatment — exact sheen and texture detail are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels in correct grid positions; each panel must show a unique expression-action-outfit combination as listed; character must remain visually consistent across all panels
Avoid: mixing up panel positions or expressions; losing the torn-paper-hole framing motif
